publishedAbstract: Starting in OpenShift Container Platform 3.11, the [Cluster Operator Framework](https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/3.11/install_config/installing-operator-framework.html) is available to help manage deployments and their components. Two in particular are the Cluster Monitoring Operator (CMO) and Prometheus Operator (PO). Installation and configuration of CMO and PO can be found here:. This document will focus on troubleshooting CMO and PO in the event of an issue.
publishedTitle: Troubleshooting OpenShift Container Platform 3.11: Cluster Monitoring and Prometheus Operators
